mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cancel_application (order_id, applicant_id, applicant_role, cancel_type, reason, status, confirm_user_id, confirm_time, platform_decision, platform_operator, platform_note, expire_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantRole}, #{cancelType}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{confirmUserId}, #{confirmTime}, #{platformDecision}, #{platformOperator}, #{platformNote}, #{expireTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
